text:
Created attachment 187292
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #6)
It will be released frequently from August, so it's okay.

Ver. 1.6.17 was appeared in 2017-10-16.
added support for ET-2610 Series and EW-M5071FT Series.

> Perhaps we should use the LOCAL mirror?
If the MASTER_SITE_BACKUP server can download the distfile once, I think that it is not necessary to use the LOCAL mirror.
